# iSHELL H1 calibration test data

This directory contains a small real iSHELL H1 calibration set for testing
2DXD-related diagnostics and tracing.

Contents:
- 5 QTH flats
- 2 ThAr arc frames

Observation log summary:
- Mode: H1
- Slit: 0.375
- Flats: QTH
- Arcs: ThAr on / ThAr off

These files are intended for private development/testing of the Python iSHELL
2DXD implementation.
